description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-4 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 7. Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-4 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 7 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab).. Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.
A very heavy pistol. It can't be concealed.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.

Two Handed Exotic Very Heavy Melee Weapon. Can use a battery pack to increase damage, details of which can be found on page 94.

Need BODY 11 or more to use it.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
Increase Body by 2 (and related stats). Stacks. Max at 10 Body.
Increase Body by 2 (and related stats). Stacks. Max at 10 Body.

Thermite rounds bury into a target and briefly ignite. When a round hits a target, it deals 1 damage to that target, ignoring armor, in addition to any other damage. If a 1 is rolled while firing, the weapon jams.
Increases magazine size to a massive 45 bullets.

Anytime the stun baton deals damage, the attack target must make an Endurance check: DV = 10+dmg (max DV: 16). On failure, the target's MOVE is reduced by 4 and all actions they attempt suffer a -4 penalty until the end of their next turn. An actor can only suffer from one instance of this effect during each of their turns.

information.notes:
WARNING: These mooks are not balanced for general play. Each of them is a somehow-busted combination of stuff included within the mook pack that was discovered during testing. Turnabout is fair play. Use at your own risk!!

Gang Wide Ability: Night City Nightmare - Nightmares are designed to be elite, boss+ tier enemies, and defeating them yields special rewards, as follows:

  • The player performing the coup de grace immediately gains 20 IP or 1 personal rep which expires after 1 in-game week.

    • The player dealing the final blow may choose up to 2 assistants - the assistants are awarded up to 10 IP each at GM discretion.

  • Scavenging the corpse of the enemy always yields 1 single-use powerup - the enemy type determines the powerup, which is listed as part of its ability. It also always yields 100eb of scrap.

Nightmares don't go down easily - by the time one is killed, its gear is rendered unusable.

Ability - I Never Die: When damage is dealt to a Nightmare Heavy, reduce that damage by 4, after armor (so damage is inflicted, armor reductions are calculated, armor is ablated if necessary, and then the damage reduction is applied). When killed, a Heavy drops 1 @UUID[Compendium.night-city-gang-and-corp-mook-pack.NCGangsnCorpsItems22.1ggXioyVR1tPYF30]{Heavy Invulnerability}.

Ability - Tough As Nails: Armor Piercing Ammo always ablates a Nightmare Heavy's armor, but only ablates it by 1 instead of by any other amount. Additionally, a Nightmare Heavy's armor can never be ablated by more than 2 in a single turn.

Extra Gear: The Heavy is always equipped with the Heavy's Stun Stick, Heavy's Metalgear, and a Very Heavy Pistol + ammo. Additionally, choose 1 of the following:

  • Heavy's Heated Blade (functionally a Rostovic Kleaver - assume it's been heated before a fight begins unless the Heavy is caught by surprise).

  • Heavy's Assault Rifle + ammunition.

Heavies are walking tanks, made to soak an entire opposing gang's firepower as they advance up the frontline. Most are completely dependent on their sponsors for the continued med support and supplies necessary to maintain themselves.
